extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD Jonas soloed to victory after escaping on the final climb, while BJERG Mikkel crashed mid-climb attempting to cover SHAW James's attack and lost yellow jersey contention.
tactical_patterns: BJERG crashed chasing SHAW's attack on final climb entry, exposing vulnerability when forced to accelerate from mechanical disruption.
CARAPAZ Richard attacked to catch breakaway GREGAARD Jonas near summit, suggesting team targeting KOM points through selective bridge efforts.
BERNAL Egan attacked solo from favorites group on descent after climb, refusing to work collaboratively despite chasing same target.
ALAPHILIPPE Julian sprinted for second place time bonus despite being 1:23 down, indicating SOUDAL QUICKSTEP prioritizing stage placement over GC.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Won solo after final climb attack while wearing 1x chainring setup, demonstrating superior descending confidence in wet conditions.
rider_signals.BJERG Mikkel: negative: Lost yellow jersey contention after crashing while chasing SHAW's attack, then suffered additional gear problems during recovery effort.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: Bridged to breakaway GREGAARD on final climb with apparent ease, showing exceptional climbing form despite 2:33 GC deficit.
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: Only rider to attack solo from favorites on descent, revealing renewed confidence in high-risk downhill moves post-injury.
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: neutral: Chain dropped 300m from finish but protected by 3km mechanical rule, maintaining 1:10 GC position through fortunate timing.
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: Sprinted aggressively for second despite being over minute down GC, suggesting stage-hunting role rather than GC protection.
rider_signals.SHAW James: positive: Launched attack on final climb approach that forced BJERG's race-changing crash, demonstrating effective tactical disruption from non-GC rider.
